subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! My tongue hath grown weary in expounding the mysteries of Thy Kingdom and in setting forth the signs of Thy dominion and the tokens of Thy bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد کل لسانی عند بیانی لاسرار ملکوتک و شروحی ایات جبروتک و آثار فیض
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
